case_title: ** TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY ** AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK VS. YAN Z ZHU ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-01-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF STEPHANIE S. HO RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100036253) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY. PLAINTIFF TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/HK)

Appearances:
Atty. Alisa J. Kim, Tel. no. 1-510-736-6293 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - Plaintiff American Express Bank's motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to Alameda County. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
